title: Great Corpus Christi turnkey pool route
supportTraining: Seller will provide 30 days of training to ensure a smooth transition.
description:
Here’s your chance to own a turnkey pool route with employees in Corpus Christi! It consists of 80 accounts generating a guaranteed $21,440 per month plus MORE from repairs and filter cleans!
***One employee manages the route***
SBA will not finance pool routes. Buyer will need cash.

What is a pool route? It’s a group of accounts being sold by a pool company. Typically it’s being sold to fund other ventures or as part of a retirement plan.

Why are pool routes better than buying a traditional business? If you compare incomes vs asking prices it’s very clear. A route generating $50,000 per year will sell for roughly $50,000. A traditional business making the same income would cost $100,000 or more to purchase.

Ad#:2400908
